_publications._publicationTitle: ERK inhibition rescues defects in fate specification of Nf1-deficient neural progenitors and brain abnormalities.

_contextSnippet: the percentage of β-gal+ cells expressing Olig2 was greatly increased...β-gal+ cells that all expressed Olig2 were dramatically increased and often formed clusters in the CC
details: Percentage of β-gal+ cells expressing Olig2 was greatly increased after acute Nf1 inactivation, with dramatic increase in CC clustering
